mapper.select: SELECT ue.id, ue.unit_id, ue.energy_id, e.name AS energy_name, e.measurement_unit, ue.create_by, ue.create_time, ue.update_by, ue.update_time, ue.deleted FROM bs_unit_energy ue LEFT JOIN bs_energy e ON e.id = ue.energy_id AND e.deleted = 0 WHERE ue.unit_id = #{unitId} AND ue.deleted = 0
SELECT id, unit_id, energy_id, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, deleted FROM bs_unit_energy WHERE unit_id = #{unitId} AND energy_id = #{energyId} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO bs_unit_energy (unit_id, energy_id, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, deleted) VALUES (#{unitId}, #{energyId}, #{createBy}, NOW(), #{updateBy}, NOW(), 0) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE deleted = 0, update_by = VALUES(update_by), update_time = NOW()
mapper.update: UPDATE bs_unit_energy SET deleted = 1, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = NOW() WHERE unit_id = #{unitId} AND energy_id = #{energyId} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE bs_unit_energy SET deleted = 1, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = NOW() WHERE unit_id = #{unitId} AND deleted = 0
